description: Get involved this holiday season with our email template designed for businesses seeking to partake in charitable giving. This template is ideal for corporate entities looking to inspire their network to donate during special occasions like Christmas and Thanksgiving. It's clean and professional design perfectly fits B2B interactions. Our template is part of the Non-Profit category, making it a great tool for fundraisers. It's specifically tailored for Giving Tuesday, a global generosity movement encouraging people and organizations to transform their communities and the world. This email template is a powerful way to engage your audience, promote philanthropy and make a difference this holiday season.
short_description: Engage your network this holiday season with our B2B-friendly, corporate email template designed for charitable giving during Christmas and Thanksgiving. Clean design, perfect for fundraisers within the Non-Profit sector, especially during Giving Tuesday. Inspire generosity, promote philanthropy, transform communities.

designer.description: I’m a growth marketing manager with a strong copywriting and ideation background. I enjoy working to make a thought or vision come to life!

html_data:
Feel good about the

difference you make this

holiday season!

#GivingTuesday is all about taking a break from holiday shopping and giving back to the non-profits who help those in need. As a company we feel it's important that we do our part to help out.

 

To do our part we will be making a donation to the GivingTuesday Organization on behalf of all our wonderful customers like you! As an added bonus to our own contribution, we will be matching every donation made through Thanksgiving. As you decide where to donate to this holiday season, we hope you will consider helping us reach our goal this holiday season and help those in need!

Give Now
 

How can you help in your own community?

Here a few ways you can give back to your community for #GivingTuesday!

Reach out to your local food pantry and donate needed items

Pack an extra lunch to hand out to someone who may be in need

Volunteer to serve a meal at your local shelter 

Learn More
